title: Better Mod List Button Fix
description: Fix the button positions of Better ModList.
body:
This mod fixes the problem that the mods button of BetterModList conflicts with other mods(like The Aether) that modify the title screen.
Before fixing. ![Before](https://i.mcmod.cn/editor/upload/20250205/1738755673_104862_WEzJ.png)
After fixing. ![After](https://i.mcmod.cn/editor/upload/20250205/1738755593_104862_wXou.png)
